name: RiskCube
long_description: RiskCube helps startups and growing businesses become vendor-ready faster by getting them the insurance they need to sell into enterprise customers, pass procurement, move through onboarding, and meet retail vendor requirements. We use AI-driven workflows and licensed broker review to compare top-rated U.S. carriers and help founders secure D&O, Tech E&O, Cyber, General Liability, Product Liability, and Certificates of Insurance (COIs). We serve AI/SaaS, Space, Fintech and Web3 startups.
one_liner: AI-native commercial insurance broker for startups.
